## API

```typescript
interface SwitchProps {
  checked?: boolean;
  defaultChecked?: boolean;
  loading?: boolean;
  disabled?: boolean;
  size?: 'm' | 's';
  onChange?: (checked: boolean) => void;
  className?: string;
}
```
